title: Design System: Human Capital Assessment Report

display.purpose: Large page titles and hero metrics.

label.purpose: Badges, tables, chart labels, and micro-copy.

shadows.name: micro-hover
shadows.purpose: Tiny feedback shadow on card hover.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Used for main actions like generating PDF or primary triggers.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #171412; color: #faf8f5; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2c2724; }

components.name: Report Card
components.description: Standard container for content, KPI metrics, and tables.
components.html:
Human Capital Index

Indeks komprehensif kapasitas modal manusia.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #f0ebe4; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Lora', serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #171412; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 1rem; color: #4a423d; margin: 0; line-height: 1.6; }

narrative.overview: The 'Executive Journal' theme elevates the Human Capital Assessment Report from a standard data dashboard to a premium, high-readability printed and digital journal. It utilizes high-contrast editorial typography, wide margins, warm background surfaces that prevent screen glare, and precise borders instead of heavy drop shadows.
keyCharacteristics: Editorial serif headings paired with clean geometric sans-serif UI elements.
Warm ivory backgrounds with white content surfaces to mimic premium paper.
Warm beige borders replacing cool/blue slates for a structured, non-digital look.
Amber-gold accents used sparingly to guide focus on key statistics and indexes.

rules.name: The 10% Accent Rule
rules.body: The Amber Gold accent is used strictly on 10% or less of any given screen. Its rarity is the point; when everything is highlighted, nothing is.

rules.name: The Ink Contrast Rule
rules.body: All body and detail text must maintain a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against their backgrounds. Text must never fade into a light gray.

rules.name: The No-Shout Letter Spacing Rule
rules.body: Headings must never have letter-spacing less than -0.04em. Tighter spacing causes characters to touch and degrades editorial readability.

rules.name: The Balanced Headline Rule
rules.body: All h1, h2, and h3 tags must apply text-wrap: balance to prevent awkward line breaks.

rules.name: The Border Depth Rule
rules.body: Use borders instead of shadows to differentiate layout containers. Borders must be solid 1px with #f0ebe4 (Warm Beige).

dos: Do use Lora for display headings and Instrument Sans for body and data labels.
Do maintain a high contrast ratio (4.5:1) for all text against backgrounds.
Do wrap large text containers with a maximum width of 75ch.
Do use @media print rules to optimize the layout for PDF exports.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right accents thicker than 1px on cards/callouts.
Don't use gradient text or background-clip text effects.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism or blurs.
Don't use heavy card shadows or box shadows with blur radii greater than 8px.
Don't use rounded corners larger than 12px for cards or inputs.
Don't use neon or high-saturation colors for core UI components.
